'''vathava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encapsulator|encapsulator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encapsulator|encapsulator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vathava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væthævæth|væthævæth]] || [[word:væthævæj|væthævæj]] || [[word:væthævæsh|væthævæsh]] || [[word:væthævæ|væthævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathathavath|vathathavath]] || [[word:vathathavaj|vathathavaj]] || [[word:vathathavash|vathathavash]] || [[word:vathathava|vathathava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathavath|vathavath]] || [[word:vathavaj|vathavaj]] || [[word:vathavash|vathavash]] || [[word:vathava|vathava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathafvath|vathafvath]] || [[word:vathafvaj|vathafvaj]] || [[word:vathafvash|vathafvash]] || [[word:vathafvaf|vathafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vathavatha|vathavatha]] || [[word:vathavaja|vathavaja]] || [[word:vathavasha|vathavasha]] || [[word:vathavaka|vathavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vathavath|vathavath]] || [[word:vathavaj|vathavaj]] || [[word:vathavash|vathavash]] || [[word:vathava|vathava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vathavathal|vathavathal]] || [[word:vathavajal|vathavajal]] || [[word:vathavashal|vathavashal]] || [[word:vathavakal|vathavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vathavathatha|vathavathatha]] || [[word:vathavajaja|vathavajaja]] || [[word:vathavashasha|vathavashasha]] || [[word:vathavaka|vathavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vathavathan|vathavathan]] || [[word:vathavajan|vathavajan]] || [[word:vathavashan|vathavashan]] || [[word:vathavakan|vathavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vathavathaoro|vathavathaoro]] || [[word:vathavajaoro|vathavajaoro]] || [[word:vathavashaoro|vathavashaoro]] || [[word:vathavakaoro|vathavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
